Game.Name: Exhaust Heat (Japan) (En)
Game.plot: F1 ROC: Race of Champions is a Driving game, developed and published by Seta Corporation,which was released in Japan in 1992.Cheat: CodesEnter the following codes at the Select Player screen:Cheat: Check SNES chips version numbersTo check your SNES chips' version, select a new file and use the name XXCHECKXX. Press reset to return to game.Cheat: Check SNES chips version numbersTo play a slot machine mini-game first make sure your game is saved in Monaco. Next select Name Change at the file select screen and change your name to CASINO. After selecting Race, you'll be taken to the slot machine mini-game.ControlsPress "A" to place your wagerPress "B" or "Down" to spinPress "Select" to exit game.Cheat: Use Opponent Names as PlayersWhile at the screen to enter the player's name, press Down or Up on Controller 2 to scroll through opponent names used in the game. This will allow the player to easily obtain a name exactly like an opponent's instead of manually needing to enter it.
